title: 读取 tool_use 块并构造 tool_result 响应
title_en: Read tool_use Blocks and Format tool_result Responses

body.goal: 手动处理 Claude 的工具调用请求，并将执行结果返回给 Claude
steps: Claude 返回 stop_reason: "tool_use"，响应中包含一个或多个 tool_use 内容块，每块有三个字段：id（唯一标识符）、name（工具名）、input（符合 input_schema 的参数对象）
从 tool_use 块中提取 name、id、input，在你的代码中执行对应的工具逻辑
构造一条新的 user 消息，content 中放入 tool_result 块，包含：tool_use_id（对应请求的 id）、content（结果，可以是字符串、嵌套内容块、或 document 块）
将这条消息发送给 Claude，Claude 会根据工具结果继续生成回复

body_en.goal: Manually handle Claude's tool call requests and return execution results
steps: Claude returns stop_reason: "tool_use" with one or more tool_use content blocks, each containing: id (unique identifier), name (tool name), input (parameters matching input_schema)
Extract name, id, and input from the tool_use block. Run the corresponding tool logic in your codebase
Build a new user message with a tool_result content block containing: tool_use_id (matching the request id), content (result as string, nested content blocks, or document blocks)
Send this message back to Claude, which will use the tool results to continue generating its response
